player_character: blocky roblox character with colored outfit and legs walking around
other_player: roblox player character that is not the main player
npc_character: non-player roblox character standing in place or walking on a path
brainrot_item: small collectible pickup item or floating object to steal
coin_currency: floating yellow coin or currency token pickup
shop_booth: shop stand booth or vendor stall with a sign or counter
ui_timer: timer countdown clock or score display on screen HUD
ui_currency_display: currency or money counter display in the corner of the screen
interactive_prompt: press E interaction prompt or button popup near an object
obstacle: wall fence barrier or obstacle blocking movement path
door_entrance: door entrance portal or teleport pad on the ground
